hooks.command: ENGINE_HOOK=1 SESSION_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/sessions/$SESSION_ID"; if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ] && [ -d "$SESSION_DIR" ]; then echo '## Session State (after compaction)'; [ -f "$SESSION_DIR/SESSION.md" ] && cat "$SESSION_DIR/SESSION.md"; LATEST=$(ls -t "$SESSION_DIR/contexts/"CONTEXT-*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then echo ''; echo '## Latest Context Snapshot'; cat "$LATEST"; fi; PLAN=$(ls -t "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/plans/"*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$PLAN" ]; then echo ''; echo "## Active Plan: $PLAN"; echo '위 플랜 파일을 Read하여 현재 작업 방향을 확인하세요.'; fi; echo ''; echo '> 컨텍스트에 ## Outcome 헤딩이 없으면 자동 추출된 raw 요약이다. 핵심만 추출: 달성한 것, 주요 결정, 다음 단계.'; fi

ENGINE_HOOK=1 SESSION_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/sessions/$SESSION_ID"; if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ] && [ -d "$SESSION_DIR" ]; then echo '## Session State'; [ -f "$SESSION_DIR/SESSION.md" ] && cat "$SESSION_DIR/SESSION.md"; LATEST=$(ls -t "$SESSION_DIR/contexts/"CONTEXT-*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then echo ''; echo '## Latest Context Snapshot'; cat "$LATEST"; fi; PLAN=$(ls -t "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/plans/"*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$PLAN" ]; then echo ''; echo "## Active Plan: $PLAN"; echo '위 플랜 파일을 Read하여 현재 작업 방향을 확인하세요.'; fi; fi

ENGINE_HOOK=1; if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ] && [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/sessions/$SESSION_ID/SESSION.md" ]; then mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/sessions/$SESSION_ID/contexts" && cp "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/sessions/$SESSION_ID/SESSION.md" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/sessions/$SESSION_ID/contexts/CONTEXT-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M)-session-end.md"; fi
